features: SURGE PROTECTED 13A EXTENSION LEAD BY MASTERPLUG: A high-quality extension lead for portable power. Specifically designed to protect equipment from power surges and spikes in the home or small offices ensuring safe and reliable power for devices

3-YEAR SURGE CONNECTED EQUIPMENT WARRANTY: Masterplug Surge products come with a ‘Connected Equipment Warranty’. Masterplug will pay up to £1,000 to repair or replace equipment if power-surge damage occurs within 3 years of purchase

SURGE AND POWER LED INDICATORS: Be connected and protected with integrated power and surge indicators which provide effective confirmation and status that the extension lead is both active and the surge protection is operating successfully

WALL-MOUNTING CAPABILITY: White, slim design and 2m cable offering a neat and tidy solution by keeping the extension lead off the floor with a wall-fixing capability. Ideal for high-value devices like laptops, TVs, and game consoles in small spaces

FOUR SAFETY SHUTTERED SOCKETS: Which automatically close when not in use preventing the insertion of foreign objects, ensuring user safety. Connect 4 devices simutaneously into one socket. Certified to BS1363-2British Standard
description: From the manufacturer Previous page Next page Previous page Next page Masterplug Extension Leads 4G Surge 2m Extension Lead 4G Switched 2m Extension Lead 6G Surge 2m Extension Lead Why our customers love it? Ideal for chunky adaptors with surge protection & extra long cable length. Why our customers love it? Good quality and value with individual switches - easier to control devices. Why our customers love it? Reliable and durable with integrated surge protection & good cable length. Safety Features Safety shuttered sockets, surge protection with indicator & BS 1363‑2 standards Safety Features Safety shuttered sockets, Switched sockets with power indicator. Safety Features Safety shuttered sockets, surge protection with indicator & BS 1363‑2 standards Features 4 sockets, 2m, Surge Protection, Wall Mountable, Safety Shutters, Indicators Features 4 Sockets, 2m Cable, Wall Mountable, Safety Shutters, Individual Switches Features 6 sockets, 2m, Surge Protection, Wall Mountable, Safety Shutters, Indicators What appliances or devices can be plugged into it? Safe for computers, phones, TVs, gaming consoles, chargers, lamps, and small appliances. Avoid high‑power appliances like heaters, ovens, irons or washing machines. Total draw must stay under 13 A (total 3120W). What protection does it have? Includes surge protection to defend connected equipment from voltage spikes, a surge indicator LED and safety‑shuttered sockets. It comes with a connected‑equipment protection (Up to £1,000 for three years) in case the surge protection fails. What do the indicator lights mean? Two LEDs show power is live, and surge protection is active. If the surge LED fails, protection may be compromised — stop using and replace the unit. Can i use it outdoors or "daisy chain" extension leads? No, it's for indoor use only (IP20 rating). It is not recommended to connect multiple extension leads together; may overload or bypass protection.
